title: Remove dead CompileMode::LocalDraft variant and offline-draft pipeline
forbidden_changes: Removing or weakening the OpenAI-style video_url block path
Sending Authorization alongside x-api-key for Anthropic providers
Rewriting on-disk v{n}.json capsules (immutable compilation history per SPEC-IR-005)
Combining unrelated refactoring with this task
Deleting the immutable_insert_and_replay test (rewrite it instead)
deliverables: CompileMode enum reduced to a single CloudPrecision variant
VideoCapsule.compilation_mode field carries serde(default) + serde(alias = 'local_draft') so legacy capsules reinterpret on read without on-disk rewrite
draft::resolve_compile_mode and draft::check_network_connectivity removed (draft.rs deleted or emptied)
engine.rs prefer_draft parameter dropped, LocalDraft branch deleted, misleading error message removed
storage.rs CapsuleBuilder signature simplified to drop the mode parameter
renderer.rs mode_label collapsed to a single literal
compile_v3/convert.rs and compile_v3/storage.rs compilation_mode field assignments cleaned up
native_engine/mod.rs prefer_draft and 'mode' plumbing removed at 6 sites
Frontend plumbing for compile_mode removed from types, mock, settings, process, collections
Backward-compat round-trip test asserting a legacy 'local_draft' capsule still deserializes
Regression test asserting engine.rs no longer contains any LocalDraft branch sentinel
acceptance_tests: cargo test --lib compile:: passes (engine, storage, renderer, draft all clean)
cargo test --lib passes for the full library
Backward-compat round-trip: deserialize {"compilation_mode": "local_draft", ...} into VideoCapsule reads back as CompileMode::CloudPrecision
engine.rs source no longer contains the LocalDraft branch sentinel
npm --prefix desktop run verify passes (svelte-check clean)
Existing on-disk v{n}.json capsules (if any) still load without rewrite
Compatibility: all compile provider paths unchanged (OpenAI-compatible, Xiaomi MiMo, Google Gemini, Anthropic-Messages, OpenAI Responses)
Migration: no in-place rewrite of v{n}.json files (SPEC-IR-005 immutable compilation history)
Migration: IR_SCHEMA_VERSION bumped to 3 signals schema change to dependent consumers
security_requirements: No network probe or 2-second TCP timeout runs during compile path (removes attack surface from check_network_connectivity)
Backwards-compatible read of legacy compilation_mode values does not weaken validation
